---
title: "Get Involved"
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
title-block-banner: "#7d6a2a"
---

If you work with tree inventories in India and would like to Get Involved With the India Tree Inventory Network, get in touch with us at [
{{< iconify bi mdi:email size=1.1em title='Email' >}}](mailto:indiainventree@gmail.com)
